content:
What's up bros,
Looking to hire a Web Developer and was wondering if there were any other sites besides Fiverr to find someone?
Fiverr is kind of inflated with basic looking websites and I'm looking for someone with a real passion for web development lol.
What's like the website where all the cool web devs go lol
Thanks!
